holdings.infoBox: RODM is an equity ETF with a total of 353 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 1.26%, Nokia Oyj at 1.26%, Royal Bank of Canada at 1.17%, The Toronto-Dominion Bank at 1.15%, and Bank of Montreal at 1.15%.

overview.description: The Hartford Multifactor Developed Markets (ex-US) ETF (RODM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund selects developed-market companies outside the US, based on factors like valuation, momentum and quality. RODM was launched on Feb 25, 2015 and is issued by The Hartford.
infoTable: Hartford Risk-Optimized Multi Developed Markets Ex-US Index
